findings.description: live_dashboard.md is STALE — shows old AUTODEV v3 worker system (Cycle 1, 5 errors). No current specialist rotation data. Misleads director.
findings.fix: Rebuild with real stats from events.jsonl + feature_queue.json

findings.description: studio_insights.json has severe ID duplication: insight-20260414-001 appears 9 times, -20260413-001 appears 4 times, 25 entries but only ~13 unique.
findings.fix: Deduplicate and assign sequential globally-unique IDs

findings.description: completed_archive.json has only 2 tasks, but studio_learnings.json reports 62 tasks_completed. 60 completed tasks are NOT being archived — housekeeping not consistently applied.
findings.fix: Reconstruct archive from events.jsonl data, enforce housekeeping each cycle

findings.description: total_cycles_completed=40 but events.jsonl has 47 entries. 7-cycle metric drift. Agent performance tracking missing 5 specialist agents (perf_code_quality, integration_e2e, faction_rep, minigame_system, 3d_scene_asset).
findings.fix: Sync cycle count to 47, add missing agents to performance tracking

findings.description: Only specialists 9-14 have run (6 of 16). Specialists 0-8 and 15 never exercised. Full audit rotation coverage not achieved until today.
findings.fix: Normal — coverage increases as events accumulate. Document baseline.

findings.description: 1 'verified' false-positive task (E2E-PARCHMENT-PRERUN-PIXEL-TRANSITION, P99) stuck in pending queue with type='verified'. Should be archived.
findings.fix: Archive to completed_archive.json, remove from queue

findings.description: No i18n/Localization Specialist in rotation — cycle_instructions.md mandates I18nRegistry usage but no specialist audits for hardcoded strings. No Balance/Economy specialist for Anam/MOS verification.
findings.evidence: Roster has 16 specialists, none cover i18n or economy auditing
findings.fix: Propose adding i18n to roster (specialist #16 or replace underused slot)

implementation_scope: Rebuild live_dashboard.md with real stats. Fix studio_insights.json deduplication. Sync studio_learnings.json metrics.
